name: Blocker Fit Guy
description: Blocker Fit Guy is a fun and challenging puzzle-action game where you guide a flexible hero through tight spaces and tricky block formations. Rotate, stretch, and fit your character into the correct shapes to pass each obstacle without getting stuck. As levels progress, layouts become more complex, testing your logic, timing, and spatial awareness. With simple controls, smooth animations, and satisfying solutions, Blocker Fit Guy delivers quick brain-teasing fun that’s easy to start and hard to put down.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
